[ R s l lHd- III/4/3ETT./482/16] CENTRAL UNIVERSITY OF GUJARAT NOTIFICATION Gandhinagar, the 2nd December, 2016 No. 2-4/2009-Admn/5822.‚ÄîThe following is published for general information.‚Äî Statute 2 Statute 2(4) - (amended) The Vice Chancellor shall hold office for a term of five years from the date on which he enters upon his office or until he attains the age of seventy years, whichever is earlier, and he shall be eligible for re-appointment for a second term. -- 4 of 7 -- [WT III- ^ 5 4] 'Hkd '371 : 3T?TT^KUI 5 Statute 11 Statute 11(1) Constitution and term of office of the Executive Council - (amended) Executive Council shall consist of the following and the Members shall hold office for term of three years, except otherwise provided. i. Vice Chancellor ii. Pro Vice Chancellor iii. A Central University Vice Chancellor or a serving University Professor of Eminence, nominated by the Executive Council on the recommendation of the Vice Chancellor iv. Dean of Students‚Äô Welfare v. Five Deans of Schools of Studies of whom not more than three shall be from each of the groups specified below by rotation according to seniority; Group-I Faculty of Social Sciences, Management and Humanities Group-II Faculty of Science, Technology & Health Sciences vi. One Professor, who is not a Dean, by rotation according to seniority, nominated by the Vice Chancellor vii. One Associate Professors, by rotation according to Seniority, nominated by the Vice Chancellor viii. One Assistant Professors, by rotation according to Seniority, nominated by the Vice Chancellor ix. TwoMembers of the Court, when constituted, elected from amongst the elected members, none of whom shall be an employee or student of the University or an institution recognized by or associated with the University x. Four persons of distinction in academic life, to be nominated by the Visitor xi. One Member each from the Categories, namely Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, Other Backward Classes, Minorities, Women and Differently Abled, shall be nominated by the Vice Chancellor as members from the teachers of the University or other Central/State Universities xii. Registrar - Secretary 11(2) Fifty percent of the Members of the Executive Council, including at-least two outside members, not belonging to the University shall form a quorum for a Meeting of the Executive Council. Statute 13 Statute 13(1) Constitution and term of office of the Academic Council - (amended) Academic Council shall consist of the following and the members shall hold office for term of three years, except otherwise provided. i. Vice Chancellor ii. Pro Vice Chancellor iii. A Central University Vice Chancellor or a serving University Professor of Eminence, nominated by the Academic Council on the recommendation of the Vice Chancellor iv. Dean of Schools of Studies v. Chairpersons of Centre of Studies vi. Six Professors, by rotation, adequately representing different Schools of Studies, according to -- 5 of 7 -- 6 * * = THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [Pa r t III‚ÄîSe c . 4] vii. vm. x. xii. xiii. xiv. xvi. xvii. xviii. seniority nominated by the Vice Chancellor Six Associate Professors, by rotation, adequately representing according to seniority nominated by the Vice Chancellor Six Assistant Professors, by rotation, adequately representing according to seniority nominated by the Vice Chancellor Dean of Students‚Äô Welfare different Schools of Studies, different Schools of Studies, Librarian One Proctor by rotation according to seniority One Provost by rotation according to seniority One Warden by rotation according to seniority Four persons not in the service of the University, co-opted by the Academic Council for their special knowledge Two Members of the Court, when constituted, elected from amongst the elected members, none of whom shall be an employee or student of the University or an institution recognized by or associated with the University. Two students‚Äô representatives, to be nominated by the Vice Chancellor on merit basis, from members of the Student Council of University, on rotation basis. Such members hall not have the right to be present at the meeting of the Academic Council when it takes up for consideration any of the following subjects: (a) Faculty positions, recruitment, conditions of service and academic freedom; (b) Actual processes of evaluating academic performance and merit of students. The following representatives: ‚Ä¢ One of Scheduled Castes ‚Ä¢ One of Scheduled Tribe ‚Ä¢ One of Other Backward Classes ‚Ä¢ One of Minorities ‚Ä¢ One of Women; and ‚Ä¢ One of the Differently Abled shall be nominated by the Vice Chancellor as members from the teachers of the University or other Central/State Universities, Registrar - Secretary 13(2) Fifty percent of the Members of the Academic Council, including at-least two outside members, not belonging to the University shall form a quorum for a meeting of the Academic Council. Statute 40 40. Schools and Centres of the University i. School of International Studies (a) Centre for Security Studies (b) Centre for International Politics -- 6 of 7 -- ^HKd WI IDPT51 : 3TTTPlKul 7 [*1PT 4] * ii. School of Social Sciences (a) Centre for Studies in Society and Development (b) Centre for Studies in Science, Technology and Innovation Policy (c) Centre for Studies in Social Management (d) Centre for Studies in Economics and Planning (e) Centre for Gandhian Thought and Peace Studies iii. School of Language, Literature and Culture Studies (a) Centre for Comparative Literature and Translation Studies (b) Centre for English Studies (c) Centre for Chinese Language and Culture (d) Centre for German Studies (e) Centre for Studies in Hindi Language and Literature (f) Centre for Study of Diaspora (g) Centre for Gujarati Language and Literature v. vi. vii. viii. Xll. xm. School of Chemical Sciences (a) Centre for Studies in Chemistry (b) Centre for Applied Chemistry School of Life Sciences School of Environment and Sustainable Development Centre for Library and Information Science Centre for Nano-Science Centre for Health, Culture and Personality Development Centre of Pharmaceutical Sciences School of Management School of Technology School of Earth Sciences and Remote Sensing Prof. S.L.
